name: Buckwheat Pancakes
recipeIngredient: 2 cups water (can add a bit more if you like thinner cakes)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix all dry ingredients until evenly blended.
2. Add the liquids to the dry mixture and stir or shake as little as possible to make batter. Small lumps are acceptable and will disappear during cooking; avoid overmixing which can result in flat and heavy pancakes.
3. Spray a non-stick griddle with Pam for about half a second, then wipe the surface with a folded paper towel. Wipe again with the same paper towel for each new batch of batter.
4. Cook until ready to serve. This yields approximately 12 medium-sized pancakes.
